title: Long-context vs RAG; agentic RAG; prompt caching
focus: 1M+ contexts; agent loops over retrieval; cost via caching.

items.label: 1M+ context windows: when do they replace RAG?
interviewQuestions: Do long context windows kill RAG? Defend your view.
What's the cost picture (latency + $) of stuffing 1M tokens vs RAG over the same corpus?

items.label: Agentic RAG: planning + tool-use over retrieval
interviewQuestions: What does agentic RAG add over a static RAG pipeline?
When does agentic RAG perform WORSE than static RAG — what are the failure modes?

items.label: Prompt caching & retrieval caching
interviewQuestions: How does prompt caching change the cost picture for repeated context?
Compare exact-match retrieval caching vs semantic caching — when does each fit?
Do long context windows kill RAG? Defend your view.
What does agentic RAG add over a static RAG pipeline?
How does prompt caching change the cost picture for repeated context?
